chunks.title: About Nidhi
chunks.text: I build applied AI systems that automate decisions — especially in robotics and industrial automation. I care about reliability, guardrails, and practical delivery. I don't ship AI that breaks in production.

chunks.title: Robotics skills
chunks.text: ROS2, Gazebo simulation, Rviz visualization, robot navigation stacks, sensor fusion. [EDIT: add your specific robots/platforms here — e.g. TurtleBot, UR5, custom hardware]

chunks.title: Automation & AI skills
chunks.text: Python, automation pipelines, applied ML, guardrail design, deterministic fallbacks. [EDIT: add your exact tools — n8n, FastAPI, PyTorch, etc.]

chunks.title: How I work
chunks.text: I don't ship AI without guardrails: validation, deterministic fallbacks, monitoring, and clear failure modes. If something is unknown, I say so and route it correctly. I look for systems that need automating and eliminate manual labor.

chunks.title: This portfolio
chunks.text: Built with Three.js and GSAP — a scroll-driven 3D corridor where each door is a project. The chatbot (that's me) runs on a Cloudflare Pages Function backed by a knowledge base. No LLM API calls — deterministic retrieval only.
